feed.title: Small Simplicity - A collection of reading lists
feed.subtitle: Understanding Intelligence from Computational Perspective

entry.title: [Paper] Data Analysis with Latent Variable Models
entry.summary: This is my reading notes for David Blei's Data Analysis with Latent Variable Models, published in Annual Stat Review in 2014: link.

entry.title: How to read a paper
entry.summary:
• Ref: medium

Before you start

Q: "why are you reading this?"

  • Write it down where you can see it while reading the paper
    • Your purpose/goal of reading may change later. You will have a different experience then.
  • Is there a clear answer for this question? If not, you probably …
